title: mentha pulegium
intro: Mentha pulegium, also known as pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, ease menstrual cramps, and reduce nausea. The health benefits of pennyroyal include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Pennyroyal can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
